examples: In recent months the city has revived its efforts to curb honking, smoking and the pestilence of plastic bags.
For plague and pestilence, plunder and pollution, the hazards of nature and the hunger of children are the foes of every nation.
So will I send upon you famine and evil beasts, and they shall bereave thee; and pestilence and blood shall pass through thee; and I will bring the sword upon thee.
However, as the parents of any small child know, it is the young who bring pestilence into the home.
An island-full of identical individuals could be wiped out by an infection, just as entire crops of genetically identical plants may succumb to plague and pestilence.
